claims_to_verify: Resource hoarding in cloud is often a rational response to reacquisition risk
Capacity bottlenecks move between power, silicon, packaging, memory, and deployment layers
Cost-only utilization targets can increase reliability and incident risk under constrained supply
Cross-functional FinOps plus SRE governance reduces both stranded spend and outage risk
notes: Sources are public and non-confidential. Re-verify investor links at publish time.
